PROJECTS

20 JUN 2020 • 1 min read

1. Project for Graduation (Coming soon..)

2. Accelerating Deeplearning Workloads using Compiler

  • Conducted in Cass Lab in Hanyang University, Advised by Prof. Yongjun Park

  • Idea : Automatically generates optimal computation graphs for inference on CPU

  • Observated TASO(SOSP, 2019) was not able to generate optimal computation graphs for CPU

3. CAPTCHA PROJECT : Building a Machine Reads Distorted Text

  • Achieved 93% of the accuracy while adopting Transfer Learning to the machine

  • Problem : A small train set which caused overfitting and low accuracy

  • Idea : Used data augmentation and Transfer Learning to avoid overfitting while raising the accuracy

  • Implementation :

    Used Otsu’s method, morphological opening to remove noise

    Adopted data augmentation and Transfer Learning to avoid overfitting

  • Result :

4. Implementing HDL Programs in FPGA

  • Trained using Verilog : FIR Filter, Mealy and Moore machine design

  • Implement LED controller and seven segment controller in FPGA

  • Implement VGA controller in FPGA

5. Embedded System Software Design (Used Achro 210T Board)

  • Cross compiled bootloader and kernel & implemented them in the device

  • Coded the LED controller which controlled LEDs on the device

  • Displayed image files using frame buffer
